_note: The immersive Genesis timeline. Dates beyond the 5 June 2026 opening are not all specified in the catalogue; left null where unverified rather than guessed.

events.title: Selection & Registration
events.description: Participant registration and screening: 15 artists selected from diverse backgrounds through a registration system and selection team (Abdullahi Ibrahim, Katurag Chinyio).

events.title: Community Sensitization Road Walk
events.description: Workshop participants walked the community in a sensitization road walk, gathering and raising awareness around waste.

events.title: Five-Day Upcycling Art Masterclass
events.description: Hands-on masterclass led by Yusuf Durodola (Understanding Upcycling Art & Environmental Consciousness), with Caroline Useh (Transition in the Creative Process) and Temitope Oladeji (The Art of Business, The Business of Art).

events.title: Making the Works
events.description: Artists transformed discarded materials into assemblages — from trash to treasure.

events.title: Exhibition Installation
events.description: Art installation by YD Studio, Lagos and The Art Exential, Lagos.

events.title: Opening Ceremony — World Environment Day
events.description: The exhibition Because There Is No Planet B opened at Nike Art Gallery, Abuja, on World Environment Day, hosted by Nike Art Gallery and sponsored by the Royal Norwegian Embassy.

events.title: Exhibition & Guest Experience
events.description: Public exhibition of the founding works; guest experience including a Royal Norwegian Embassy crew visitation.

events.title: Panel Discussion
events.description: A panel on sustainability and the circular economy, moderated by Temitope Oladeji.

events.title: Òdàlè Dà'lẹ̀ — Performance Art
events.description: Performance led by Yusuf Durodola confronting environmental neglect; curated by Temitope Oladeji, photographed by Benjamin Oladapo.

events.title: Recognition of Contributors
events.description: Contributors recognized for their part in the Genesis Chapter (basis for Planet B certificates).

events.title: Media Coverage & Closing
events.description: Documented by Edge Media and NTA; national press coverage (The Nation, Tribune, Punch).
